revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 128x32px pixel-art sprite sheet, 1 row x 4 columns, each frame exactly 32x32px. Solid #FF00FF magenta chroma-key background fills all empty space, no gradients. No cell separator lines, no grid lines, no frame borders, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark.

Style/profile: snes16_platformer_v1, crisp 16-bit low-resolution pixel art, sharp square pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent bright palette, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source, fine readable pixel clusters.

Character: original mythical-Japan action RPG village boy, about ten years old, lively and cheerful. Not a samurai, not a ninja. Messy short black hair, round cheerful face but slim child proportions, about 3 heads tall, small-ish head, not a big-headed chibi mascot. Simple short vermilion-and-cream child's kimono with a yellow sash, tiny straw sandals. Front view facing viewer, idle standing, feet natural shoulder-width apart. Bright cheerful colors.

Sheet animation: four-frame idle loop in one row of 4 equal cells. Frame 1 neutral idle. Frame 2 subtle slow-breath pose. Frame 3 warm blink and small smile. Frame 4 returns to neutral for looping. Same character identity and exact same scale in every frame. Keep head size, head-to-body ratio, body width, limb thickness, standing height, pose footprint, centered position, and ground line identical across all frames. Re-pose only with subtle idle breathing/blink changes; do not redraw, restyle, resize, or alter outfit. Every frame must stay inside its own 32x32 cell with clear solid magenta margin between the figure and every cell edge. Feet align on the same ground line in all frames.

Cleanliness hard constraints: no detached fragments, no isolated pixel islands, no seam slivers, no dust specks, no leftover effect residue. No companion creature, no bird. No logos, no letter emblems. Avoid any likeness or characters from Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna. No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no UI.
